full_text:
Liu Kuan (Wenyao) 劉寬
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Kuan (劉寬), styledWenyao, was born in Hongnong. A kind man, once fell into drunken sleep during court meeting. Warned about the Turbans, Liu Kuan was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Liu Kuan lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
